zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Gernon III於1045年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙特費奎特時，他的父親Robert De Gernon25歲，母親Madam Dinham10歲。他於大約1079年與Emma de Dinan在英國英格蘭艾可斯坦斯泰德 莫特費其特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1086年在英國英格蘭艾可斯坦斯泰德 維利亞享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Gernon III was born in 1045, in Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Robert De Gernon, was 25 and his mother, Madam Dinham, was 10. He married Emma de Dinan about 1079, in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1066. He died in 1086, in Stansted Village, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Gernon IIIが1045年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスモントフィクエトで生まれた時，父Robert De Gernonは25歳，母Madam Dinhamは10歳であった。約1079年にイギリスイギリスエセックススタンステド モウントフィトチェトでEmma de Dinanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1086年にイギリスイギリスエセックススタンステド ヴィラッジで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Gernon III(이)가 1045년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 몽피크트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Gernon(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Madam Dinham(은)는 10세였다. 그는 대략 1079년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스탠스테드 모우트핏쳇에서 Emma de Dinan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1086년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스탠스테드 비라지에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Gernon III родился в 1045 г. в местности монтфикует, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert De Gernon было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Madam Dinham, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Dinan около 1079 г. в местности станстед маунтфичет, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности станстед вилладж, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
